footer_line: All trades subject to commissioner review · LFF Est. 2020

transactions.headline: Sofa Kings fleece the Fumble Fam
transactions.verdict: One of these teams is 4-0 and one of them is named the Fumble Fam. Draw your own conclusions.

transactions.headline: Purple Reign burn their top claim on a backup tight end
transactions.verdict: Forty-seven dollars. For a tight end. In October. Bold.

transactions.headline: Turf Titans cut bait on their first-round pick
transactions.verdict: When you’re 0-4, every move looks like a cry for help. This one is.
